headline: LyondellBasell Rallies As Tight Polyethylene Supply Lifts Cash Performance
summary: LyondellBasell Industries (NYSE:LYB) is seeing tighter polyethylene supply in North America following recent supply disruptions. The company is benefiting from favorable feedstock costs, supporting margins in its core plastics business. Management reports that cash improvement targets have been surpassed as the materials sector works through a cyclical low. LyondellBasell enters this phase of tighter North American polyethylene supply with its shares at $80.56. The stock is up 6.0% over the...
